registries.description: An object that contains the details for a public registry.

nextToken.description: The nextToken value to include in a future DescribeRepositories request. If the results of a DescribeRepositories request exceed maxResults, you can use this value to retrieve the next page of results. If there are no more results, this value is null.

registryId.description: The Amazon Web Services account ID that's associated with the registry. If you do not specify a registry, the default public registry is assumed.

registryArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the public registry.

registryUri.description: The URI of a public registry. The URI contains a universal prefix and the registry alias.

verified.description: Indicates whether the account is a verified Amazon Web Services Marketplace vendor. If an account is verified, each public repository receives a verified account badge on the Amazon ECR Public Gallery.

aliases.description: An array of objects that represents the aliases for a public registry.

repositories.description: A list of repository objects corresponding to valid repositories.

nextToken.description: The nextToken value to include in a future DescribeRepositories request. When the results of a DescribeRepositories request exceed maxResults, this value can be used to retrieve the next page of results. If there are no more results to return, this value is null.

repositoryArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) that identifies the repository. The ARN contains the arn:aws:ecr namespace, followed by the region of the repository, Amazon Web Services account ID of the repository owner, repository namespace, and repository name. For example, arn:aws:ecr:region:012345678910:repository/test.

registryId.description: The Amazon Web Services account ID that's associated with the public registry that contains the repository.

repositoryUri.description: The URI for the repository. You can use this URI for container image push and pull operations.

createdAt.description: The date and time, in JavaScript date format, when the repository was created.

authorizationData.description: An authorization token data object that corresponds to a public registry.

authorizationToken.description: A base64-encoded string that contains authorization data for a public Amazon ECR registry. When the string is decoded, it's presented in the format user:password for public registry authentication using docker login.

expiresAt.description: The Unix time in seconds and milliseconds when the authorization token expires. Authorization tokens are valid for 12 hours.

registryCatalogData.description: The catalog metadata for the public registry.

displayName.description:
The display name for a public registry. This appears on the Amazon ECR Public Gallery.

Only accounts that have the verified account badge can have a registry display name.

registryCatalogData.description: The catalog data for the public registry.

displayName.description:
The display name for a public registry. This appears on the Amazon ECR Public Gallery.

Only accounts that have the verified account badge can have a registry display name.

layers.description: A list of image layer objects that correspond to the image layer references in the request.

layerAvailability.description: The availability status of the image layer.

layerSize.description: The size, in bytes, of the image layer.

mediaType.description: The media type of the layer, such as application/vnd.docker.image.rootfs.diff.tar.gzip or application/vnd.oci.image.layer.v1.tar+gzip.

imageIds.description: The image IDs of the deleted images.

imageTag.description: The tag that's used for the image.

registryId.description: The public registry ID that's associated with the request.

repositoryName.description: The repository name that's associated with the request.

uploadId.description: The upload ID that's associated with the layer.

catalogData.description: The catalog data for a repository. This data is publicly visible in the Amazon ECR Public Gallery.

repositoryArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) that identifies the repository. The ARN contains the arn:aws:ecr namespace, followed by the region of the repository, Amazon Web Services account ID of the repository owner, repository namespace, and repository name. For example, arn:aws:ecr:region:012345678910:repository/test.

registryId.description: The Amazon Web Services account ID that's associated with the public registry that contains the repository.

repositoryUri.description: The URI for the repository. You can use this URI for container image push and pull operations.

createdAt.description: The date and time, in JavaScript date format, when the repository was created.

repositoryArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) that identifies the repository. The ARN contains the arn:aws:ecr namespace, followed by the region of the repository, Amazon Web Services account ID of the repository owner, repository namespace, and repository name. For example, arn:aws:ecr:region:012345678910:repository/test.

registryId.description: The Amazon Web Services account ID that's associated with the public registry that contains the repository.

repositoryUri.description: The URI for the repository. You can use this URI for container image push and pull operations.

createdAt.description: The date and time, in JavaScript date format, when the repository was created.

registryId.description: The registry ID that's associated with the request.

repositoryName.description: The repository name that's associated with the request.

policyText.description: The JSON repository policy that was deleted from the repository.

imageTagDetails.description: The image tag details for the images in the requested repository.

nextToken.description: The nextToken value to include in a future DescribeImageTags request. When the results of a DescribeImageTags request exceed maxResults, you can use this value to retrieve the next page of results. If there are no more results to return, this value is null.

imageTag.description: The tag that's associated with the image.

createdAt.description: The time stamp that indicates when the image tag was created.

imageDetail.description: An object that describes the details of an image.

imageSizeInBytes.description:
The size, in bytes, of the image in the repository.

If the image is a manifest list, this is the max size of all manifests in the list.

Beginning with Docker version 1.9, the Docker client compresses image layers before pushing them to a V2 Docker registry. The output of the docker images command shows the uncompressed image size, so it might return a larger image size than the image sizes that are returned by DescribeImages.

imagePushedAt.description: The date and time, expressed in standard JavaScript date format, which the current image tag was pushed to the repository at.

imageManifestMediaType.description: The media type of the image manifest.

artifactMediaType.description: The artifact media type of the image.

imageDetails.description: A list of ImageDetail objects that contain data about the image.

nextToken.description: The nextToken value to include in a future DescribeImages request. When the results of a DescribeImages request exceed maxResults, you can use this value to retrieve the next page of results. If there are no more results to return, this value is null.

registryId.description: The Amazon Web Services account ID that's associated with the public registry where this image belongs.

repositoryName.description: The name of the repository where this image belongs.

imageTags.description: The list of tags that's associated with this image.

imageSizeInBytes.description:
The size, in bytes, of the image in the repository.

If the image is a manifest list, this is the max size of all manifests in the list.

Beginning with Docker version 1.9, the Docker client compresses image layers before pushing them to a V2 Docker registry. The output of the docker images command shows the uncompressed image size, so it might return a larger image size than the image sizes that are returned by DescribeImages.

imagePushedAt.description: The date and time, expressed in standard JavaScript date format, that the current image was pushed to the repository at.

imageManifestMediaType.description: The media type of the image manifest.

artifactMediaType.description: The artifact media type of the image.

architectures.description:
The architecture tags that are associated with the repository.

Only supported operating system tags appear publicly in the Amazon ECR Public Gallery. For more information, see RepositoryCatalogDataInput.

operatingSystems.description:
The operating system tags that are associated with the repository.

Only supported operating system tags appear publicly in the Amazon ECR Public Gallery. For more information, see RepositoryCatalogDataInput.

logoUrl.description: The URL that contains the logo that's associated with the repository.

aboutText.description: The longform description of the contents of the repository. This text appears in the repository details on the Amazon ECR Public Gallery.

usageText.description: The longform usage details of the contents of the repository. The usage text provides context for users of the repository.

marketplaceCertified.description: Indicates whether the repository is certified by Amazon Web Services Marketplace.

registryId.description: The registry ID that's associated with the request.

repositoryName.description: The repository name that's associated with the request.

policyText.description: The repository policy text that's associated with the repository. The policy text will be in JSON format.

uploadId.description: The upload ID for the layer upload. This parameter is passed to further UploadLayerPart and CompleteLayerUpload operations.

partSize.description: The size, in bytes, that Amazon ECR expects future layer part uploads to be.

Key.description: One part of a key-value pair that make up a tag. A key is a general label that acts like a category for more specific tag values.

Value.description: The optional part of a key-value pair that make up a tag. A value acts as a descriptor within a tag category (key).

registryId.description: The Amazon Web Services account ID that's associated with the registry containing the image.

repositoryName.description: The name of the repository that's associated with the image.

imageId.description: An object that contains the image tag and image digest associated with an image.

imageTag.description: The tag that's used for the image.

imageManifest.description: The image manifest that's associated with the image.

imageManifestMediaType.description: The manifest media type of the image.

architectures.description:
The architecture tags that are associated with the repository.

Only supported operating system tags appear publicly in the Amazon ECR Public Gallery. For more information, see RepositoryCatalogDataInput.

operatingSystems.description:
The operating system tags that are associated with the repository.

Only supported operating system tags appear publicly in the Amazon ECR Public Gallery. For more information, see RepositoryCatalogDataInput.

logoUrl.description: The URL that contains the logo that's associated with the repository.

aboutText.description: The longform description of the contents of the repository. This text appears in the repository details on the Amazon ECR Public Gallery.

usageText.description: The longform usage details of the contents of the repository. The usage text provides context for users of the repository.

marketplaceCertified.description: Indicates whether the repository is certified by Amazon Web Services Marketplace.

registryId.description: The registry ID that's associated with the request.

repositoryName.description: The repository name that's associated with the request.

policyText.description: The JSON repository policy text that's applied to the repository.

registryId.description: The registry ID that's associated with the request.

repositoryName.description: The repository name that's associated with the request.

uploadId.description: The upload ID that's associated with the request.

lastByteReceived.description: The integer value of the last byte that's received in the request.
